name: ghost-layer-mcp
display_name: Ghost Layer — Dual-Chain Bridge + Execution Matrix MCP
description: MCP server for Ghost Layer cross-chain bridge and on-chain Execution Matrix. Settle RLUSD (XRPL), XAH (Xahau), and USDC (Base/EVM) micropayments with full compliance receipts. Mint 54-block programmable routing state (LIQUIDITY, PRIVACY, SPEED, POOL, HOOKS, BASE) as URIToken on Xahau — server validates face centers, verifies state hash, broadcasts XAHAU_MINT_CONFIRMED SSE.

tools.name: ghost_layer_bridge
tools.description: Initiate a cross-chain bridge transaction. Returns pay_to address and memo_hex for XRPL payment, or authorization parameters for EIP-3009 gasless USDC transfer.

amount.description: Amount to bridge as decimal string

tools.name: ghost_bridge_status
tools.description: Check the settlement status of a bridge transaction.

bridge_id.description: Bridge transaction ID returned by ghost_layer_bridge

tools.name: ghost_audit_stats
tools.description: Retrieve public audit statistics: total bridge volume, chain breakdown, honeypot detection count.

tools.name: cube_state_mint
tools.description: Mint the Ghost Layer Execution Matrix state as a URIToken on Xahau. Submit the full 54-block payload (6 faces × center + 4 edges + 4 corners). Server validates all face centers via the equation center=clamp(weighted_sum(edges)×coefficient(corners), min, max), verifies the CUBE-XXXXXXXX hash, then submits a real URITokenMint (tx type 45) with 6 HookParameters (face centers as hex) and a CUBE_STATE memo. Returns xahau_tx_hash on success. Fires XAHAU_MINT_CONFIRMED SSE event. View on-chain at https://xahauexplorer.com/tx/<hash>.

cube_hash.description: CUBE-XXXXXXXX deterministic djb2 hash of the 54-block state

tools.name: eip3009_authorize
tools.description: Submit an EIP-3009 gasless USDC transfer authorization for Ghost Layer to execute on Base chain.
